questions.question: What is the main objective of a decision tree learning model?
questions.hint: A decision tree learning model is used to classify data points into predefined categories.

questions.question: How does decision tree induction work?
questions.hint: Decision tree induction involves growing a decision tree by recursively partitioning the data into smaller subsets based on the features of the data points.

questions.question: What are the strengths and weaknesses of decision tree learning models?
questions.hint: Strengths: Decision tree models are simple to understand and interpret, and they can handle categorical features. Weaknesses: Decision tree models can suffer from overfitting, and they may not perform well with high-dimensional data.
